name: Mike Morgan
transactions: June 6, 1978:Drafted by theOakland Athleticsin the1st round(4th pick) of the 1978 amateur draft.
November 3, 1980:Traded by theOakland Athleticsto theNew York YankeesforFred Stanley.
December 9, 1982:Traded by theNew York YankeeswithDave Collins,Fred McGriffand cash to theToronto Blue JaysforTom DoddandDale Murray.
December 3, 1984:Drafted by theSeattle Marinersfrom theToronto Blue Jaysin the 1984 rule 5 draft.
December 9, 1987:Traded by theSeattle Marinersto theBaltimore OriolesforKen Dixon.
March 12, 1989:Traded by theBaltimore Oriolesto theLos Angeles DodgersforMike Devereaux.
October 28, 1991:Granted Free Agency.
December 3, 1991:Signed as a Free Agent with theChicago Cubs.
June 16, 1995:Traded by theChicago CubswithFrancisco Morales(minors) andPaul Torres(minors) to theSt. Louis CardinalsforTodd Zeileand cash.
November 6, 1995:Granted Free Agency.
December 7, 1995:Signed as a Free Agent with theSt. Louis Cardinals.
August 28, 1996:Released by theSt. Louis Cardinals.
September 4, 1996:Signed as a Free Agent with theCincinnati Reds.
October 28, 1997:Granted Free Agency.
December 16, 1997:Signed as a Free Agent with theMinnesota Twins.
August 25, 1998:Traded by theMinnesota Twinsto theChicago Cubsfor a player to be named later and cash. TheChicago CubssentScott Downs(November 3, 1998) to theMinnesota Twinsto complete the trade.
October 30, 1998:Granted Free Agency.
January 26, 1999:Signed as a Free Agent with theTexas Rangers.
November 8, 1999:Granted Free Agency.
January 14, 2000:Signed as a Free Agent with theArizona Diamondbacks.
November 19, 2001:Granted Free Agency.
January 3, 2002:Signed as a Free Agent with theArizona Diamondbacks.
